# ComponentName

Brief description of the component — what it does, where it appears in the UI, and when you'd reach for it.

## Usage

```tsx
import { ComponentName } from '@/components/path/to/ComponentName';

<ComponentName
  propOne="value"
  propTwo={true}
/>
```
